failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by omitting item_id and passing product_id as 0 instead of the provided string "1762337868".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was clear: retrieve the price for item_id 1345513440 using ProductCatalogSearch with the provided item_id and product_id. At index 2, the agent had all required information from index 1, including item_id "1345513440" and product_id "1762337868", but invoked/prepared the tool with malformed arguments: {"product_id": 0}. This omitted the required item_id and used an integer instead of the required string product_id. The tool then explicitly returned a SchemaError at index 3, confirming the invocation was invalid.
